 # Changelog
 
+## 0.8.2 — 2025-12-30
+
+### Changed
+- Release: disable npm progress output in Codex runs via `scripts/release.sh`.

+### Docs
+- Release checklist now requires GitHub release notes to match the full changelog section.
+

 ### Added
